About me

Engineer by day,
artist by night.

Hi! I’m Hemanvitha — an AI & Data Engineer finishing my MS in Data Intelligence at San Jose State University. I build systems at the intersection of LLM orchestration and production-scale data engineering.

My work spans data engineering (Spark, Kafka, dbt, Airflow, Delta Lake) and AI systems (LangGraph agents, RAG, fine-tuning). I care about systems that are fast, reliable, and solve real problems.

Actively looking for mid-level AI or Data Engineering roles in fintech, healthtech, or AI-native startups across the US.

When I’m not coding

Calm in patterns & symmetry

The darker the mystery, the better

Discipline on the floor & in the code

📄 ✦   Research   ✦ 🔬
Publications

Research work.

📘 Book Chapter · Wiley, JAN 2025
Leveraging Predictive Analytics: Enhancing Brain Tumor Classification with XGBoost
Katakam Hemanvitha et al.
Combined CNN feature extraction with XGBoost ensemble learning for brain tumor classification. Individual CNN achieved 85% accuracy; the CNN + XGBoost integration boosted performance to 93% accuracy — demonstrating that hybrid deep learning + classical ML approaches can significantly outperform standalone models in medical imaging tasks.
View Paper ↗
📗 Journal Article · IRJET, Vol. 10, Oct 2023 · Impact Factor 8.226
A Comprehensive Evaluation of Machine Learning Approaches for Breast Cancer Categorization
Venkata Siddarth Gullipalli, Katakam Hemanvitha, P. Naga Jyothi
Benchmarked CNN, ANN, and SVM for breast cancer classification on histopathology images. CNN achieved the highest accuracy at 88%, outperforming ANN (71%) and SVM (59%). Study highlights CNN’s superior sensitivity in detecting malignant cases from breast tissue samples.
View Paper ↗
